title: Electrical Apparatus and Equipment, Wiring Supplies, and Related Equipment Merchant Wholesalers

labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 423610 ($21,563,384,273) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 423610 ($222,793,400,000).
